case_goal: Assess whether this political rumor spreads in Los Angeles.

evidence.text_input: The city quietly approved a plan to convert 3 public parks in South LA into temporary homeless encampments — they're calling it managed outdoor communities but residents were never consulted. Karen Bass signed off on it last month and there was zero press coverage. Share this before they scrub it.
evidence.speaker_context: A neighborhood Facebook post claims city hall is hiding the plan from residents.
